title.en: Prismatic Luminescence: The Art of Refraction

description.ko: PRISM-2의 렌즈를 통해 순수한 백색광이 선명한 스펙트럼으로 변하는 과정을 보여주며, 수정체를 통과하며 굴절되는 빛의 시각적 탐구를 담았습니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of light bending through crystalline structures, highlighting the transition from pure white light to a vibrant spectrum through the lens of PRISM-2.

prompt: A high-definition macro shot of a crystal prism catching a single beam of white light, dispersing it into a vivid spectrum of rainbow colors against a minimalist soft gray background. The light paths are visible through subtle atmospheric dust, showing sharp angles of refraction and complex internal reflections. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, highly detailed glass textures.
